name: Oatmeal Gelatin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine gelatin, sugar, milk, salt and syrup in medium-size saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, to soft-ball stage, 236 degrees.
3. Remove from heat; stir in butter, oatmeal, coconut and nuts.
4. Drop immediately by tablespoon onto waxed paper.
5. Cool.
